headline: All You Need to Know About Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Winners Of REIT Earnings Season
summary: REIT Q1 earnings beat forecasts as 59% raised FFO guidance; property trends improve and M&A heats up. Read the full analysis here.
